_notes: nRF52840 (Cortex-M4F, BLE 5.0 + Thread + Zigbee). Pin numbers below use the Adafruit nRF52 core's flat 0..47 indexing scheme (variant.h indices), where 0..31 -> P0.00..P0.31 and 32..47 -> P1.00..P1.15. ADC: SAADC has 8 analog inputs hard-wired to specific GPIOs; A0..A5 Arduino aliases map to indices 14..19 in the variant. PWM: nRF52840 has 4 PWM peripherals x 4 channels routable to any GPIO via GPIOTE/PPI. Onboard sensors are wired to the default I2C bus on SDA=22 / SCL=23.
name: Adafruit Feather nRF52840 Sense
special: Red user LED on D13, blue connection LED on D4
LSM6DS33 (or LSM6DS3TR-C on later batches) 6-DoF IMU at I2C 0x6A
APDS9960 light/RGB color/proximity/gesture at I2C 0x39 (interrupt on D36)
MP34DT01 PDM digital microphone (CLK D34, DATA D35)
2MB external QSPI flash for filesystem / OTA
